name: Raised from the Tomb
oracleText: Return target creature card from your graveyard to the battlefield tapped. If that creature is legendary, put a +1/+1 counter on it. You lose 2 life.
notes: Created from a checked Messianic Fulfillment card list item; first-pass mechanics were added. Source boundary is anchored to Luke with Matthew, Mark, and John as support material per the Biblical-series timeline guide. Classics theme art uses James Tissot's "The Resurrection of Lazarus" via Wikimedia Commons.

classics.license: Public domain; Brooklyn Museum Commons upload marked with no known restrictions.
classics.creditText: James Tissot, The Resurrection of Lazarus
classics.sourceNotes: Excellent Lazarus imagery for the tomb-opening moment.
